caption: A screen capture shows a browser window displaying a "List Randomizer" page from RANDOM.ORG. The page lists numbers 1 through 10 in a randomized sequence: "1. 9", "2. 5", "3. 9", "4. 6", "5. 4", "6. 6", "7. 4", "8. 7", "9. 2", and "10. 1". An advisory banner at the top states, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain." Below the list, a timestamp reads "2023-11-23 03:24:00 UTC". Overlaid on the right side of the browser is a Twitch chat window. One message from "nogest" reads, "i think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can everyone you can," and a message from "Nightbot" says, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://rb.gy/Nze6eK9". A small webcam feed in the bottom right shows a man with a beard wearing a black shirt. At the bottom of the screen, a red banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible. The scene remains static across the frames.
